title: Senior Software Engineer - Zomato Holdings Services - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Zomato Holdings Services - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
We at Zomato Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Zomato Holdings Services:
Zomato Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Holdings Services!
jsonLd.skills: Agile/Scrum, Docker, Machine Learning, JavaScript, Java, Node.js, TensorFlow, Git
